notes:
## What's new

- Auto-updates now show a small floating "Updating to vX.Y.Zâ€¦" pill in the corner with a real download progress bar. No more wondering whether VORP is doing something or just frozen.

## Smoother startup

- If VORP ever felt stuck on the launch screen, it shouldn't anymore. The app now gives itself safety timeouts so a slow network or stuck server call can't trap you on the splash forever.
- After 8 seconds on the launch screen, a small hint appears letting you know if things are taking longer than usual.
